prompt: Create multiple icons with a security shield containing a cross, a question mark and an exclamation mark respectively. You must follow the flat icon style provided in the image.
prompt_refined:
Generate three distinct information graphics icons, presented in a row. Each icon must be a security shield rendered in the flat design style of image 1, featuring a light grey outer border and a vibrant green inner fill.

- The first icon, positioned on the left, shall have a white cross symbol centered within its green shield.
- The second icon, in the center, shall have a white question mark symbol centered within its green shield.
- The third icon, on the right, shall have a white exclamation mark symbol centered within its green shield.

All inner symbols should be clean, simple, and in the same white, flat style as the checkmark shown in image 1.
objects: security shield icon on the left
white cross symbol centered within the left shield
security shield icon in the center
white question mark symbol centered within the center shield
security shield icon on the right
white exclamation mark symbol centered within the right shield
light grey outer border for each shield
vibrant green inner fill for each shield
flat design style for all icons and symbols
